narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township C (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,096 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.8 percentage points.
